title: Posting to a company page from a Monday board
excerpt:
Hi there, 
At the moment, you can only post to a person’s individual LinkedIn page via the integration. Please can we have it so that you can post to company pages via Monday.com? 
Thanks

posts.author: MichelleT (Michelle Thomas)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
You may want to try Publisher on the monday.com Marketplace. It supports LinkedIn Company Pages along with 9 other social platforms, making it one of the best tools to automate your entire social media workflow—all within monday.com.
